input.query: What was the weather at KJFK when the incident occurred at 14:32Z on 2024-03-15?
Look up the aircraft performance data for a Boeing 737-800.
What are the current NOTAMs for KORD on 2024-06-01?
What does FAR 91.175 say about descending below MDA/DA?
What is the elevation and runway information for KASE?
Show me the ADS-B track for aircraft A4B210 during the 10-minute window around the loss of separation event at 19:45Z.
What were the weather conditions at KDCA and what NOTAMs were active when the CRJ-200 had an engine failure on departure on 2024-01-20?
For the landing overrun at KMDT on 2024-05-10, what were the airport conditions and what does FAR 91.103 require about preflight planning?
Pull the ADS-B track for Mode S hex code A0F2C8 between 08:00Z and 08:30Z and also get the weather at KDEN at 08:15Z on 2024-07-22.
What are the performance characteristics of the A320 and what does FAR 25.125 say about landing distance requirements?
An ERJ-145 with Mode S A1234F had a tail strike on landing at KBOS at 22:10Z on 2024-09-05. Get me the airport info, the weather at the time, and the aircraft track for 22:00Z to 22:15Z.
Was the pilot in compliance with FAR 91.155 regarding VFR weather minimums when flying near KLAS on 2024-04-18 at 16:00Z?
Look up FAR 91.185 regarding IFR communication failure procedures.
A DHC-6 Twin Otter experienced a bird strike at PANC on 2024-08-12. Get the aircraft performance specs and check if there were any relevant NOTAMs about bird activity.

For the unstabilized approach incident at KSFO on 2024-11-03 at 03:45Z involving a B777 (Mode S hex ABCDEF), retrieve the weather, the aircraft track from 03:30Z to 03:50Z, the airport layout, and the B777 performance data.
What were the crosswind conditions at KLGA when the A319 landed at 18:25Z on 2024-02-28?
Check what NOTAMs were active at KIAH on 2024-10-15 and pull the airport metadata to see which runways might have been affected.
What are the fuel reserve requirements under FAR 91.167 for IFR flights?
Get me the ADS-B tracks for both aircraft involved in the near-miss: A7E001 and A8F320, during the window 14:00Z to 14:20Z on 2024-06-30.

During the CFIT accident investigation near LOWI on 2024-12-01 at 06:15Z, retrieve the airport terrain data, weather observations, active NOTAMs, and the aircraft track (Mode S hex 3C4A12) from 06:00Z to 06:20Z.
What does FAR 91.117 say about airspeed limits below 10,000 feet, and what are the performance characteristics of the E175 that was cited for the violation?
Retrieve the weather at both KJFK and KEWR at 11:00Z on 2024-03-22 to compare conditions for the divert decision.
What is the runway length at KEGE and what are the high-altitude performance specs of a CL30 Challenger?
Look up FAR 91.13 on careless and reckless operation.
For the gear-up landing at KTEB on 2024-07-08 at 20:30Z, get the weather, NOTAMs, airport info, aircraft specs for the BE36 Bonanza, and the ADS-B track (Mode S hex A55D19) from 20:15Z to 20:35Z.
What are the minimum equipment list requirements under FAR 91.213?
Check weather at KMDW at 15:45Z on 2024-08-19 and look up FAR 121.613 regarding dispatch requirements in weather conditions.
What are the specs for a Pilatus PC-12?
During the turbulence encounter involving a B763 (Mode S hex AC0099) at 2024-04-05 17:30Z, get the aircraft track from 17:20Z to 17:40Z and retrieve the aircraft performance characteristics.
Check if there were any NOTAMs affecting PAFA on 2024-01-15 and get the airport info for Fairbanks.
Investigate the helicopter wire strike near KVNY on 2024-09-20 at 12:00Z: get weather, NOTAMs for obstacle information, and look up FAR 91.119 on minimum safe altitudes.
Get the airport information for LUKLA, the Tenzing-Hillary Airport in Nepal.

A Cessna Citation X (C750, Mode S hex A90B11) experienced a cabin depressurization at FL430 at 10:05Z on 2024-05-30. Retrieve the track from 10:00Z to 10:25Z, the aircraft specs, and check what FAR 91.211 says about supplemental oxygen requirements.
Compare the weather at KSEA and KPDX at 09:00Z on 2024-11-10 and check NOTAMs at both airports for a diversion analysis.

For the midair collision risk event at KOSH during AirVenture on 2024-07-25, retrieve the airport info, check NOTAMs for the special procedures, get weather at 18:00Z, look up FAR 91.126 on traffic pattern operations, and pull ADS-B tracks for both aircraft (Mode S hex A11111 and A22222) from 17:50Z to 18:10Z.
